children.text: Please take a moment to enter your login information and mobile quick login PIN#

Note: You must enter the login info from your Direct Express® web account in order to view your info with this app. If you do not already have one, go to https://login.usdirectexpress.com to set up an account.

DISCLAIMER: The Direct Express® Debit MasterCard® is issued by Comerica Bank, pursuant to a license by MasterCard International Incorporated. MasterCard® is a registered trademark of MasterCard International Incorporated. Direct Express® is a service mark of the U.S. Department of the Treasury, Financial Management Service. The developers of this application are in no way affiliated with Comerica Bank, MasterCard International Incorporated, or the U.S. Department of the Treasury.
Please confirm your login image and phrase. This should match the login image and phrase you set up on the Direct Express® website.
If this is not your image and phrase, do not continue.
Enter a PIN# to secure access to your account from this device. This number will automatically log you into Direct Express® using your stored login information.
